No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus links to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also explicitly fosters appreciation of cultural diversity (Competency E), aligning with Target 4.7.
